name: Winter Vegetable Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the celery root, potatoes, turnips, and leeks in a large saucepan.
2. Cover with cold water. Place over medium-high heat.
3. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until all of the vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Drain well. Pass the vegetables through a ricer.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste. Divide among 4 plates and serve immediately.
